testCases: TC1: input { param1:10, param2:5000, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { total: 625, breakdown: { baseCost:500, volumeCost:100, queryCost:25, realTimeSurcharge:0, total:625 } }
TC2: input { param1:0, param2:100, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { error: "Data Volume (GB) must be greater than 0" }
TC3: input { param1:1, param2:0, param3:"advanced", param4:true } → output { total: 1275, breakdown: { baseCost:1000, volumeCost:20, queryCost:0, realTimeSurcharge:255, total:1275 } }
TC4: input { param1:100, param2:10000, param3:"custom", param4:true } → output { total: 7750, breakdown: { baseCost:2000, volumeCost:4000, queryCost:200, realTimeSurcharge:1550, total:7750 } }
TC5: input { param1:10, param2:500, param3:"premium", param4:false } → output { error: "Invalid analysis type. Must be one of: basic, advanced, custom" }
TC6: input { param1:-5, param2:100, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { error: "Data Volume (GB) must be greater than 0" }
TC7: input { param1:"abc", param2:100, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { error: "Data Volume (GB) must be a number" }
TC8: input { param1:20, param2:"abc", param3:"basic", param4:true } → output { error: "Monthly Queries must be a number" }
TC9: input { param1:20, param2:10000, param3:"ADVANCED", param4:true } → output { total: 1875, breakdown: { baseCost:1000, volumeCost:400, queryCost:100, realTimeSurcharge:375, total:1875 } }
TC10: input { param1:10, param2:1000, param3:"basic", param4:"true" } → output { error: "Real-Time Processing must be a boolean (true or false)" }
TC11: input { param1:20, param2:1000, param3:"basic" } → output { error: "Real-Time Processing must be a boolean (true or false)" }

TC12: input { param1:10000, param2:1000000, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { total: 105500, breakdown: { baseCost:500, volumeCost:100000, queryCost:5000, realTimeSurcharge:0, total:105500 } }
TC13: input { param1:1, param2:0, param3:"", param4:false } → output { error: "Analysis type is required" }
TC14: input { param1:0.5, param2:500, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { total: 507.5, breakdown: { baseCost:500, volumeCost:5, queryCost:2.5, realTimeSurcharge:0, total:507.5 } }
TC15: input { param1:10, param2:-100, param3:"basic", param4:false } → output { error: "Monthly Queries must be 0 or greater" }
TC16: input { param1:0, param2:0, param3:"advanced", param4:true } → output { error: "Data Volume (GB) must be greater than 0" }
TC17: input { param1:10, param2:500, param3:" Basic ", param4:false } → output { total: 552.5, breakdown: { baseCost:500, volumeCost:50, queryCost:2.5, realTimeSurcharge:0, total:552.5 } }
TC18: input { param1:1, param2:2000000, param3:"custom", param4:false } → output { total: 42040, breakdown: { baseCost:2000, volumeCost:40, queryCost:40000, realTimeSurcharge:0, total:42040 } }
TC19: input { param1:5, param2:100, param3:"basic", param4:null } → output { error: "Real-Time Processing must be a boolean (true or false)" }
TC20: input { param1:20, param2:10000, param3:"advanced", param4:false } → output { total: 1500, breakdown: { baseCost:1000, volumeCost:400, queryCost:100, realTimeSurcharge:0, total:1500 } }
